title: Saudi World Cup progress in balance after heavy loss to Spain

snapshot.title: Saudi World Cup progress in balance after heavy loss to Spain
snapshot.description: DUBAi: European champions Spain comprehensively beat Saudi Arabia 4-0 at Atlanta Stadium on Sunday night to leave the Green Falcons’ hopes of progress to the Round of 32 of the 2026 World Cup hanging in the balance. The result leaves Spain top of Group H with four points while Saudi are stuck on one point in third place. They will need a positive result in their last match if
snapshot.author: Ali Khaled
snapshot.pageTitle: Saudi World Cup progress in balance after heavy loss to Spain | Arab News
